ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-04-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert S. Levin, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Lubaba Islam, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Georgia Gross, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on April 22, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant John Gross, an individual, was filed on October 28, 2010.
Statement of Damages was filed on April 16, 2010, and served on defendant on March 19, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 21, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Lubaba Islam, and against the Defaulted Defendant Georgia Gross, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $250,000.00.
Costs - $430.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $250,430.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
